---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement to the platform
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
Example: "When an employee asks about leave balance, the agent cannot access real-time data..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Affected Component

Which part of the system does this touch?

- [ ] Backend / API (FastAPI)
- [ ] AI Agents (HR / IT / Finance / Planner)
- [ ] RAG / Retrieval (ChromaDB / BM25 / CRAG)
- [ ] LangGraph Workflow
- [ ] Frontend (React / TypeScript)
- [ ] Workflow Engine (Actions / Approvals)
- [ ] Authentication / Security
- [ ] DevOps / CI/CD / Docker
- [ ] Documentation

## Acceptance Criteria

What does "done" look like for this feature?

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, related issues, or any other context.
